name: My doctor says pre-existing asthma worsened by work chemicals—can I still claim?
description: Yes, claim covers work-aggravated portion of pre-existing respiratory issues.[2]

mainEntity.name: My doctor says pre-existing asthma worsened by work chemicals—can I still claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, claim covers work-aggravated portion of pre-existing respiratory issues.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, if work exposure aggravated** your condition, Utah workers' comp covers the increase in impairment.[2]

Apportionment separates pre-existing from occupational worsening via medical reports.[1]

**Key factors:**
- Proof of aggravation (before/after tests)
- Exposure history
- No prior disability claims

**Practical guidance:** Get specialist opinion on work causation; lawyer handles disputes.
Aggravation claims succeed often.
